parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The action performed. Can be created or deleted.

parameters.name: starred_at
parameters.description: The time the star was created, in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ. Will be null for the deleted action.

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: The user that starred (or unstarred) the repository.

request.description: star event payload (JSON request body of the webhook delivery).

responses.description: Receiver must respond with HTTP 200 within 10 seconds. A non-200 response or a response slower than 10 seconds is recorded as a failed delivery; GitHub does not automatically redeliver.

missing: No full example payload body is provided in the source for this event; object-typed properties (repository, sender, hook, commits) are not expanded.
summary: star webhook event. Sent when a repository is starred or unstarred (action = created | deleted). Delivered as an HTTP POST with X-GitHub-Event: star.
